rationale: Both notes indicate a close methodological link: the 2024 paper positions itself as extending indirect-questioning methods for sensitive survey items, and the 2010 paper is a prior marketing method paper on item randomized response with Bayesian IRT and noncompliance modeling. Given this direct overlap in core constructs (social desirability bias, randomized/indirect response, Bayesian latent modeling) and an exact DOI match in the references, this is plausibly more than an incidental mention.
